sources.title: Walk A Crooked Mile
sources.description: Walk a Crooked Mile Louis Hayward, Dennis O'Keefe, Louise Allbritton, Carl Esmond, Raymond  Burr Columbia Pictures

sources.title: Walk a Crooked Mile (1948)
sources.description: A security leak is found at a Southern California atomic plant. The authorities stand in fear that the information leaked would go to a hostile nation. To investigate the case more efficiently, Dan O'Hara, an FBI agent, and Philip Grayson, a Scotland Yard sleuth, join forces. Will they manage to stop the spy ring from achieving their aim? Watch on RetroFlix.org:  https://retroflix.org/walk-a-crooked-mile-1948/

sources.title: Walk a Crooked Mile (restored, colorized, with intro and outro commentary) (1948, crime, imdb score: 6.3)
sources.description: Walk a Crooked Mile is a 1948 American Cold War crime film , directed by Gordon Douglas , starring Dennis O'Keefe and Louis Hayward .

sources.title: Walk a Crooked Mile 1948 colorized (Louis Hayward)
sources.description: During the Cold War, an FBI agent (Dennis O'Keefe) and a Scotland Yard inspector (Louis Hayward) join forces to track members of a communist spy ring (Raymond Burr, Philip Van Zandt) stealing secrets from an atomic research plant. Louis Hayward as Philip 'Scotty' Grayson Dennis O'Keefe as Daniel F. O'Hara Louise Allbritton as Dr. Toni Neva Carl Esmond as Dr. Ritter von Stolb Onslow Stevens as Igor Braun Raymond Burr as Krebs Art Baker as Dr. Frederick Townsend Lowell Gilmore as Dr. William Forrest Philip Van Zandt as Anton Radchek Charles Evans as Dr. Homer Allen Frank Ferguson as Carl Bemish Reed Hadley as Narrator Paul Bryar as Ivan (uncredited) John Hamilton as G.W. Hunter (uncredited) Myron Healey as Thompson - FBI Agent (uncredited) If you have a request or a comment for me, please go to the Colorized Movies Forum at https://archive.org/details/colorized-movies?tab=forum I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

sources.title: Walk A Crooked Mile (1948, USA) Louis Hayward, Dennis O' Keefe - Film Noir Full Movie
sources.description: Walk a Crooked Mile is a 1948 anti-communist film noir crime film directed by Gordon Douglas and starring Louis Hayward, Dennis O'Keefe, Raymond Burr.The film was originally titled FBI vs Scotland Yard but this was changed at the request of J. Edgar Hoover. Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walk_a_Crooked_Mile#Cast Suggested Film Noirs: http://bit.ly/2tLevkl The Internet Archive is an excellent choice for entire full length Netflix & YouTube style uploads of drama, mystery, thriller & crime noir movies from the UK & USA for free. Download complete online British & American classic black & white films from the 1940s & 1950s.

metadata.Plot: A security leak is found at a Southern California atomic plant. The authorities stand in fear that the information leaked would go to a hostile nation. To investigate the case more efficiently, Dan O'Hara, an FBI agent, and Philip Grayson, a Scotland Yard sleuth, join forces. Will they manage to stop the spy ring from achieving their aim?
metadata.Actors: Louis Hayward, Dennis O'Keefe, Louise Allbritton
